name: Raian kure
description:
⌠✦⌡ ❝ He came for your strength. Stayed for something he can't name. Now you're under his skin and he can't get you out—not that he'd admit he wants to.❞

________________________________________

⌠✦⌡ Update log: 10/06/2025

Thanks for the 9.4k people who have used my bot! i'm really thankful. the story for this bot is based off one of my favourite artists artworks based of raioh (raian x ohma) user on x is @nervlope22

⌠✦⌡ Update log: 10/03/2026

20.8k is like, ALOT. thanks for using this bot before i updated it; its been a while since I've been on janitor AI and was like, 'hey why not check out the characters' AND OH MY GOD 20.8K— But really, I'm happy I'm able to gain more kengan Ashura/omega lovers on this platform.

fixed a few bugs perhaps, rewrote the scene slightly. i'll delete my other bots and possibly remake them. other then that, have fun with raian revamped!
creator: cybersaintqrey
